news.title: ECA partners with Birkbeck on India campus push
news.summary_en: Education Centre of Australia (ECA) has expanded its global campus network through a new partnership with Birkbeck, University of London, supporting the establishment of its Bengaluru campus as part of efforts to bring UK and Australian universities into India’s education landscape.
news.author: Abhishek Nair
news.original_title: ECA partners with Birkbeck on India campus push
news.summary_cn: Education Centre of Australia (ECA) has expanded its global campus network through a new partnership with Birkbeck, University of London, supporting the establishment of its Bengaluru campus as part of efforts to bring UK and Australian universities into India’s education landscape.

news.title: UK international enrolments down 30% year on year
news.summary_en: BUILA survey points to sharp declines across South Asian markets as institutions tighten recruitment before new Home Office compliance measures take effect.
news.author: Abhishek Nair
news.original_title: UK international enrolments down 30% year on year
news.summary_cn: BUILA survey points to sharp declines across South Asian markets as institutions tighten recruitment before new Home Office compliance measures take effect.

news.title: Canada’s new student arrivals sink beneath Covid-era lows
news.summary_en: Canada’s new study permit approval rating dropped to 36% last year, as the number of first-time students coming to the country plunged well below Covid-era levels, recent IRCC data has revealed.
news.author: Polly Nash
news.original_title: Canada’s new student arrivals sink beneath Covid-era lows
news.summary_cn: Canada’s new study permit approval rating dropped to 36% last year, as the number of first-time students coming to the country plunged well below Covid-era levels, recent IRCC data has revealed.

news.title: London’s ‘evening university’ to open first-ever IBC in India
news.summary_en: Birkbeck College, University of London, known for specialising in evening higher education in the UK, is set to open a campus in Bengaluru offering traditional three-year undergraduate and one-year postgraduate business degrees.
news.author: Abhishek Nair
news.original_title: London’s ‘evening university’ to open first-ever IBC in India
news.summary_cn: Birkbeck College, University of London, known for specialising in evening higher education in the UK, is set to open a campus in Bengaluru offering traditional three-year undergraduate and one-year postgraduate business degrees.

news.title: British Council set to become National Agency for Erasmus+
news.summary_en: The UK has taken the final steps to rejoin Erasmus+, as the British Council is named the country's National Agency for the initiative.
news.author: Polly Nash
news.original_title: British Council set to become National Agency for Erasmus+
news.summary_cn: The UK has taken the final steps to rejoin Erasmus+, as the British Council is named the country's National Agency for the initiative.

news.title: South Korea’s 310k int’l student surge brings sustainability into focus
news.summary_en: With South Korea now hosting more than 310,000 international students, experts say the conversation must shift from volume-driven enrolment to a more balanced and transparent policy approach.
news.author: Abhishek Nair
news.original_title: South Korea’s 310k int’l student surge brings sustainability into focus
news.summary_cn: With South Korea now hosting more than 310,000 international students, experts say the conversation must shift from volume-driven enrolment to a more balanced and transparent policy approach.

news.title: My CEO story… Reka Lenart, ALTO
news.summary_en: The PIE sat down with Reka Lenart, executive director at ALTO, to find out what inspires her, how a passion for capoeira keeps her energised, and the upcoming projects she's particularly excited about.
news.author: The PIE News team
news.original_title: My CEO story… Reka Lenart, ALTO
news.summary_cn: The PIE sat down with Reka Lenart, executive director at ALTO, to find out what inspires her, how a passion for capoeira keeps her energised, and the upcoming projects she's particularly excited about.

news.title: Hungary election ushers in higher education reset with Europe in focus
news.summary_en: Hungary’s 2026 election result is being viewed as a potential turning point for the country’s higher education sector, with leaders pointing to renewed engagement with Europe, restored institutional autonomy, and a possible reversal of controversial reforms.
news.author: Kim Martin
news.original_title: Hungary election ushers in higher education reset with Europe in focus
news.summary_cn: Hungary’s 2026 election result is being viewed as a potential turning point for the country’s higher education sector, with leaders pointing to renewed engagement with Europe, restored institutional autonomy, and a possible reversal of controversial reforms.

news.title: US visa refusals hit decade high
news.summary_en: As F-1 visa refusals reach record highs, a new report has revealed increasingly entrenched regional disparities, warning that US policies are in “direct opposition” to current global demographic realities.
news.author: Polly Nash
news.original_title: US visa refusals hit decade high
news.summary_cn: As F-1 visa refusals reach record highs, a new report has revealed increasingly entrenched regional disparities, warning that US policies are in “direct opposition” to current global demographic realities.

news.title: EC English Language Centres closes Bristol and Montreal sites
news.summary_en: EC English Language Centres has decided to close two of its language hubs following a strategic review of the business.
news.author: Beth Kennedy
news.original_title: EC English Language Centres closes Bristol and Montreal sites
news.summary_cn: EC English Language Centres has decided to close two of its language hubs following a strategic review of the business.
